summary: Current HEAD keeps the One-command PR-ready Closure Story, Architecture, canonical Spec, tests, and run-session invariants consistent across the public CLI, typed-stop, repair, review, and final-prepare paths.
inspection_summary: Inspected the current-head Story, roadmap, Architecture, canonical Spec and test plan, target model, design SSOT reconciliation, traceability and verification artifacts; traced the run-session composition and independently ran the focused public-CLI/runtime suite (144/144 pass).
inspection_inputs: .vibepro/qa/e2e-3da7bb24.json -> 5/5 pass with production owners, implementation and repair commits, fresh independent review, and current-head final prepare
.vibepro/qa/conformance-3da7bb24.json -> origin/main 81, current 80, delta -1, no new run-session CLI reverse dependency
.vibepro/pr/story-vibepro-one-command-pr-ready-closure/design-ssot-reconciliation.json -> passed with no missing child, stale child, coverage gap, or contradiction
judgment_delta: Initial concern that the production implementation result could be trusted without proving the managed worktree HEAD -> resolved because guarded-run-session reloads the actual managed HEAD, rejects a mismatched reported head_sha, and rebinds the Run before verify/review/final prepare.

Initial concern that needs_changes repair could reach PR-ready on stale evidence -> resolved because safe-action-orchestrator permits repair replay only through verify and independent_review, and final_prepare alone may return pr_ready after a current-HEAD Gate check.

Initial concern that the new owner might duplicate predecessor connectors/review orchestration or cross the CLI boundary -> resolved because the owner is injection-only, guarded-run-session composes the existing production connectors and independent-review orchestrator, target-model assigns it to run-session, graph/source inspection found no owner-to-CLI reverse edge, and conformance improved by one violation.

Regression and path-surface concern across legacy, fallback, public CLI, persisted artifact, typed-stop/resume/cancel, and report/Gate outputs -> resolved by negative-path unit coverage, production-shaped public CLI E2E, current-head traceability artifacts, and the 287-test frozen-head regression suite.
